and, uh, community Select Committee.

uh, to introduce yourselves.

That was in 2019 to 2023. So
Kia, and thank you for the opportunity to be here.

Uh, with me is Emma Leach, uh, on this side, uh,
Emma is the Senior Assistant Ombudsman, uh, responsible

perhaps if I just make a few very preliminary remarks, uh,

Uh, one was reports of concern.

the moment, uh, with the inquest, uh, into Malachi Beck.
Uh, and in that context, failures to record reports
of concern and adequate assessment of reports of concern,
failure to consider multiple reports in a holistic manner.
So those were significant.

kotahi as well, in terms of where they might like to live

context of placement, uh, by ot.

uh, identified.

um, to identify how

their organization to address the challenges, uh,

this report will make a difference for OT
